Terms and Conditions

← Back to Home

1. Introduction

Welcome to ConEco. By accessing or using our platform, you agree to be bound by these Terms and Conditions. Please read them carefully before using our services.

2. User Responsibilities

As a user of ConEco, you are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account information and for all activities that occur under your account. You agree to provide accurate and complete information when registering and using our platform.

3. Vendor and Service Provider Obligations

Vendors and service providers on ConEco are expected to provide accurate descriptions of their products and services, deliver orders in a timely manner, and maintain high standards of customer service.

4. Payment Terms

Payments for products and services purchased through ConEco are processed securely through our payment gateway. Users are responsible for ensuring that their payment information is accurate and up-to-date.

5. Limitation of Liability

ConEco is not liable for any damages arising from the use of our platform, including but not limited to direct, indirect, incidental, punitive, and consequential damages.

6. Changes to Terms

We reserve the right to modify these Terms and Conditions at any time. Any changes will be effective immediately upon posting on our website. Your continued use of the platform after any changes constitutes your acceptance of the new Terms and Conditions.

© 2026 ConEco. All rights reserved.
